```erlang
-spec solve(nums :: list(integer()), queries :: list(list(integer()))) -> list(integer()).

solve(nums, Queries) ->
    % Precompute the popcount-depth for each number in nums
    PopcountDepth = precompute_popcount_depths(nums),
    
    % Build a frequency map for each depth
    Freq = build_freq_map(nums, PopcountDepth),
    
    % For each depth, create a prefix sum array for efficient range queries
    PrefixSums = build_prefix_sums(Freq),
    
    % Process each query
    Answer = process_queries(Queries, nums, PopcountDepth, Freq, PrefixSums),
    Answer.

precompute_popcount_depths(nums) ->
    lists:map(fun(N) -> compute_popcount_depth(N) end, nums).

compute_popcount_depth(N) ->
    current = N,
    depth = 0,
    loop(current, depth).

loop(0, _) ->
    0;
loop(Current, Depth) ->
    Next = popcount(Current),
    loop(Next, Depth + 1).

popcount(X) ->
    binary:count(X).

build_freq_map(nums, PopcountDepth) ->
    Freq = dict:new(),
    lists:foreach(fun({Idx, Depth}) ->
        case dict:find(Depth, Freq) of
            {ok, Arr} ->
                dict:put(Depth, [1 | Arr], Freq);
            error ->
                dict:put(Depth, [1], Freq)
        end
    end, lists:zip(lists:seq(0, length(nums)-1), PopcountDepth)).

build_prefix_sums(Freq) ->
    PrefixSums = dict:new(),
    lists:foreach(fun(Depth) ->
        Arr = dict:fetch(Depth, Freq),
        Prefix = build_prefix(Arr),
        dict:put(Depth, Prefix, PrefixSums)
    end, dict:keys(Freq)),
    PrefixSums.

build_prefix(Arr) ->
    Prefix = lists:foldl(fun(X, Acc) ->
        [hd(Acc) + X | Acc]
    end, [0], Arr).

process_queries(Queries, nums, PopcountDepth, Freq, PrefixSums) ->
    lists:map(fun(Q) ->
        case lists:split(1, Q) of
            {Type, Rest} ->
                case Type of
                    1 ->
                        [L, R, K] = Rest,
                        case dict:find(K, PrefixSums) of
                            {ok, Prefix} ->
                                Count = get_count(Prefix, L, R),
                                Count;
                            error ->
                                0
                        end;
                    2 ->
                        [Idx, Val] = Rest,
                        NewVal = Val,
                        % Update the value in nums
                        NewNums = lists:sublist(nums, 0, Idx) ++ [NewVal] ++ lists:sublist(nums, Idx+1, length(nums)-1-Idx),
                        % Recompute the popcount-depth for the updated value
                        OldDepth = PopcountDepth[Idx],
                        NewDepth = compute_popcount_depth(NewVal),
                        % Update the frequency map
                        OldDepth1 = OldDepth,
                        NewDepth1 = NewDepth,
                        case OldDepth1 /= NewDepth1 of
                            true ->
                                % Decrement the old depth's count
                                case dict:find(OldDepth1, Freq) of
                                    {ok, Arr} ->
                                        NewArr = lists:sublist(Arr, 0, Idx) ++ [0] ++ lists:sublist(Arr, Idx+1, length(Arr)-1-Idx),
                                        dict:put(OldDepth1, NewArr, Freq);
                                    error ->
                                        ok
                                end,
                                % Increment the new depth's count
                                case dict:find(NewDepth1, Freq) of
                                    {ok, Arr} ->
                                        NewArr = lists:sublist(Arr, 0, Idx) ++ [1] ++ lists:sublist(Arr, Idx+1, length(Arr)-1-Idx),
                                        dict:put(NewDepth1, NewArr, Freq);
                                    error ->
                                        dict:put(NewDepth1, [1], Freq)
                                end,
                                % Update the prefix sums for the old and new depths
                                case dict:find(OldDepth1, PrefixSums) of
                                    {ok, OldPrefix} ->
                                        NewOldPrefix = update_prefix(OldPrefix, OldDepth1, Freq),
                                        dict:put(OldDepth1, NewOldPrefix, PrefixSums);
                                    error ->
                                        ok
                                end,
                                case dict:find(NewDepth1, PrefixSums) of
                                    {ok, NewPrefix} ->
                                        NewNewPrefix = update_prefix(NewPrefix, NewDepth1, Freq),
                                        dict:put(NewDepth1, NewNewPrefix, PrefixSums);
                                    error ->
                                        ok
                                end
                        end,
                        % Update the popcount-depth for the updated value
                        NewPopcountDepth = lists:sublist(PopcountDepth, 0, Idx) ++ [NewDepth] ++ lists:sublist(PopcountDepth, Idx+1, length(PopcountDepth)-1-Idx),
                        NewPopcountDepth
                end
        end
    end, []).

get_count(Prefix, L, R) ->
    Prefix[R + 1] - Prefix[L].

update_prefix(Prefix, Depth, Freq) ->
    Arr = dict:fetch(Depth, Freq),
    NewPrefix = lists:foldl(fun(I, Acc) ->
        Val = Arr[I],
        Acc + Val
    end, 0, lists:seq(0, length(Prefix)-1)),
    NewPrefix.
```

```erlang
-spec solve(nums :: list(integer()), queries :: list(list(integer()))) -> list(integer()).

solve(nums, Queries) ->
    % Precompute the popcount-depth for each number in nums
    PopcountDepth = lists:map(fun Num -> compute_popcount_depth(Num) end, nums),
    
    % Build a frequency map for each depth
    Freq = build_freq_map(PopcountDepth, nums),
    
    % Build prefix sums for each depth
    PrefixSums = build_prefix_sums(Freq, nums),
    
    % Process each query
    Answer = process_queries(Queries, PopcountDepth, Freq, PrefixSums, nums),
    Answer.

compute_popcount_depth(Num) ->
    Current = Num,
    Depth = 0,
    while(Current > 0) ->
        Current = popcount(Current),
        Depth = Depth + 1
    end,
    Depth.

popcount(X) ->
    binary:bit_size(erlang:integer_to_binary(X, [utf8])) - binary:bit_size(erlang:integer_to_binary(X, [utf8])) + 1.

build_freq_map(PopcountDepth, nums) ->
    Freq = maps:new(),
    lists:foreach(fun(I) ->
        Depth = lists:nth(I + 1, PopcountDepth),
        Key = Depth,
        Value = lists:sublist(nums, I + 1),
        maps:put(Key, Value, Freq)
    end, lists:seq(0, length(nums) - 1)),
    Freq.

build_prefix_sums(Freq, nums) ->
    PrefixSums = maps:new(),
    maps:foldl(fun(Depth, Acc) ->
        Arr = maps:get(Depth, Freq),
        Prefix = build_prefix(Arr),
        maps:put(Depth, Prefix, Acc)
    end, PrefixSums, maps:keys(Freq)).

build_prefix(Arr) ->
    Prefix = lists:map(fun(I) ->
        if I == 0 -> 0;
           true -> lists:sum(lists:sublist(Arr, 1, I))
        end
    end, lists:seq(0, length(Arr))),
    Prefix.

process_queries(Queries, PopcountDepth, Freq, PrefixSums, nums) ->
    Answer = lists:map(fun(Q) ->
        case lists: nth(1, Q) of
            1 ->
                [_, L, R, K] = Q,
                Prefix = maps:get(K, PrefixSums, []),
                case Prefix of
                    [] -> 0;
                    _ ->
                        Count = lists: nth(R + 1, Prefix) - lists: nth(L, Prefix),
                        Count
                end;
            2 ->
                [_,Idx,Val] = Q,
                % Update the value in nums
                NewNums = lists:sublist(nums, 1, Idx - 1) ++ [Val] ++ lists:sublist(nums, Idx + 1, length(nums) - Idx - 1),
                % Recompute the popcount-depth for the updated value
                NewDepth = compute_popcount_depth(Val),
                % Update the frequency map
                OldDepth = lists:nth(Idx + 1, PopcountDepth),
                if OldDepth /= NewDepth ->
                    % Decrement the old depth's count
                    OldArr = maps:get(OldDepth, Freq),
                    NewOldArr = lists:map(fun(I) ->
                        if I == Idx -> 0;
                           true -> lists:nth(I + 1, OldArr)
                        end
                    end, lists:seq(0, length(OldArr) - 1)),
                    maps:put(OldDepth, NewOldArr, Freq),
                    % Increment the new depth's count
                    NewArr = maps:get(NewDepth, Freq, lists:map(fun(_) -> 0 end)),
                    NewNewArr = lists:map(fun(I) ->
                        if I == Idx -> 1;
                           true -> lists:nth(I + 1, NewArr)
                        end
                    end, lists:seq(0, length(NewArr) - 1)),
                    maps:put(NewDepth, NewNewArr, Freq),
                    % Update the prefix sums for the old and new depths
                    OldPrefix = maps:get(OldDepth, PrefixSums, []),
                    NewOldPrefix = lists:map(fun(I) ->
                        if I == Idx -> OldPrefix[I] - 1;
                           true -> OldPrefix[I]
                        end
                    end, lists:seq(0, length(OldPrefix) - 1)),
                    maps:put(OldDepth, NewOldPrefix, PrefixSums),
                    NewPrefix = maps:get(NewDepth, PrefixSums, []),
                    NewNewPrefix = lists:map(fun(I) ->
                        if I == Idx -> NewPrefix[I] + 1;
                           true -> NewPrefix[I]
                        end
                    end, lists:seq(0, length(NewPrefix) - 1)),
                    maps:put(NewDepth, NewNewPrefix, PrefixSums)
                end,
                % Update the popcount-depth for the updated value
                NewPopcountDepth = lists:sublist(PopcountDepth, 1, Idx - 1) ++ [NewDepth] ++ lists:sublist(PopcountDepth, Idx + 1, length(PopcountDepth) - Idx - 1),
                NewPopcountDepth
                end
        end
    end, [], Queries),
    Answer.
```

```erlang
-module(solve).
-include("solve.hrl").

-spec solve(nums :: list(integer()), queries :: list(list(integer()))) -> list(integer()).

solve(nums, Queries) ->
    PrecomputedDepth = precompute_depths(nums),
    FreqMap = build_freq_map(nums, PrecomputedDepth),
    PrefixSums = build_prefix_sums(FreqMap, nums),
    process_queries(Queries, PrecomputedDepth, FreqMap, PrefixSums, nums).

precompute_depths(nums) ->
    lists:map(fun(N) -> compute_depth(N) end, nums).

compute_depth(N) ->
    current = N,
    depth = 0,
    loop(current, depth).

loop(0, _) ->
    0;
loop(Current, Depth) ->
    Next = popcount(Current),
    NewDepth = Depth + 1,
    loop(Next, NewDepth).

popcount(X) ->
    binary:count(X).

build_freq_map(nums, PrecomputedDepth) ->
    FreqMap = dict:from_list(lists:zip(lists:seq(1, length(nums)), PrecomputedDepth)),
    FreqMap.

build_prefix_sums(FreqMap, nums) ->
    PrefixSums = dict:from_list(lists:map(fun({Key, Values}) ->
        Prefix = build_prefix(Values),
        {Key, Prefix}
    end, dict:to_list(FreqMap))),
    PrefixSums.

build_prefix(Values) ->
    Length = length(Values),
    Prefix = lists:map(fun(I) ->
        if I == 0 -> 0;
           true -> lists:sum(lists:sublist(Values, 1, I))
        end
    end, lists:seq(0, Length)),
    Prefix.

process_queries(Queries, PrecomputedDepth, FreqMap, PrefixSums, nums) ->
    Answer = process_query(Queries, PrecomputedDepth, FreqMap, PrefixSums, nums, []),
    Answer.

process_query([], _, _, _, _) ->
    [];

process_query([Q | Qs], PrecomputedDepth, FreqMap, PrefixSums, nums, Answer) ->
    case lists: nth(1, Q) of
        1 ->
            [L, R, K] = lists:sublist(Q, 4),
            Prefix = dict:find(K, PrefixSums),
            case Prefix of
                {ok, PrefixList} ->
                    Count = lists: nth(R + 1, PrefixList) - lists: nth(L, PrefixList),
                    process_query(Qs, PrecomputedDepth, FreqMap, PrefixSums, nums, [Count | Answer]);
                _ ->
                    process_query(Qs, PrecomputedDepth, FreqMap, PrefixSums, nums, [0 | Answer])
            end;
        2 ->
            [Idx, Val] = lists:sublist(Q, 3),
            NewVal = Val,
            NewNums = lists:sublist(nums, 1, Idx - 1) ++ [NewVal] ++ lists:sublist(nums, Idx + 1, length(nums) - Idx - 1),
            NewDepth = compute_depth(NewVal),
            OldDepth = PrecomputedDepth[Idx + 1],
            NewPrecomputedDepth = lists:sublist(PrecomputedDepth, 1, Idx) ++ [NewDepth] ++ lists:sublist(PrecomputedDepth, Idx + 2, length(PrecomputedDepth)),
            NewFreqMap = update_freq_map(FreqMap, OldDepth, NewDepth, Idx),
            NewPrefixSums = update_prefix_sums(PrefixSums, OldDepth, NewDepth, Idx),
            process_query(Qs, NewPrecomputedDepth, NewFreqMap, NewPrefixSums, NewNums, Answer)
    end.

update_freq_map(FreqMap, OldDepth, NewDepth, Idx) ->
    OldValues = dict:find(OldDepth, FreqMap),
    NewValues = lists:sublist(OldValues, 1, Idx - 1) ++ [0] ++ lists:sublist(OldValues, Idx + 1, length(OldValues) - Idx),
    dict:store(OldDepth, NewValues, FreqMap),
    NewValues2 = dict:find(NewDepth, FreqMap),
    NewValues3 = lists:sublist(NewValues2, 1, Idx - 1) ++ [1] ++ lists:sublist(NewValues2, Idx + 1, length(NewValues2) - Idx),
    dict:store(NewDepth, NewValues3, FreqMap).

update_prefix_sums(PrefixSums, OldDepth, NewDepth, Idx) ->
    OldPrefix = dict:find(OldDepth, PrefixSums),
    NewPrefix = lists:map(fun(I) ->
        if I == 0 -> 0;
           true -> lists:sum(lists:sublist(OldPrefix, 1, I)) - (lists: nth(I, OldPrefix) == 1)
        end
    end, lists:seq(0, length(OldPrefix) - 1)),
    dict:store(OldDepth, NewPrefix, PrefixSums),
    NewPrefix2 = dict:find(NewDepth, PrefixSums),
    NewPrefix3 = lists:map(fun(I) ->
        if I == 0 -> 0;
           true -> lists:sum(lists:sublist(NewPrefix2, 1, I)) + (lists: nth(I, NewPrefix2) == 1)
        end
    end, lists:seq(0, length(NewPrefix2) - 1)),
    dict:store(NewDepth, NewPrefix3, PrefixSums).
```
